label: Declining trend: the ad slowed the decline
verdict: Streams are still below the pre-campaign baseline: the observed post-period runs −46.2% versus baseline, so at a glance the campaign looks like a failure. But without the ad the decline would have been steeper, to about −57.1% below baseline. The ad slowed the decline and retained an estimated 89K streams versus the no-ad counterfactual (95% credible interval 68K to 110K), a 25.6% lift. It slowed the decline, it did not reverse it. Lead with streams retained, not the headline drop.
